KEYWORDS
post-click conversion rate, multi-task learning, sample selection
bias, data sparsity, entire-space modeling
1
INTRODUCTION
Conversion rate (CVR) prediction is an essential task for ranking
system in industrial applications, such as online advertising and
recommendation etc.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
In ESMM, two auxiliary tasks of predict-
ing the post-view click-through rate (CTR) and post-view click-
through&conversion rate (CTCVR) are introduced.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
ESMM consistently outperforms competitive models,
which demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

Entire Space Multi-Task Model: An Effective Approach for
Estimating Post-Click Conversion Rate
Xiao Ma, Liqin Zhao, Guan Huang, Zhi Wang, Zelin Hu, Xiaoqiang Zhu, Kun Gai
Alibaba Inc.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
{maxiao.mx, liqin.zlq, bingyi.wz, xiaoqiang.zxq, jingshi.gk}@alibaba-inc.com
ABSTRACT
Estimating post-click conversion rate (CVR) accurately is crucial
for ranking systems in industrial applications such as recommenda-
tion and advertising.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
Experiments on dataset gathered from traffic logs of Taobao’s recom-
mender system demonstrate that ESMM significantly outperforms
competitive methods.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
To the best of our knowledge, this
is the first public dataset which contains samples with sequential
dependence of click and conversion labels for CVR modeling.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:

recommended items, users might click interested ones and further

concepts.finding:
In this paper, by making good use of sequential pattern of user
actions, we propose a novel approach named Entire Space Multi-
task Model (ESMM), which is able to eliminate the SSB and DS
problems simultaneously.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
Two associated probabilities are: post-view
click-through rate (CTR) with pCTR = p(z = 1|x) and post-view
click&conversion rate (CTCVR) with pCTCVR = p(y = 1,z = 1|x).
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

In this paper, we model CVR in a brand-new
perspective by making good use of sequential pattern of user ac-
tions, i.e., impression →click →conversion.
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

concepts.finding:
The proposed Entire
Space Multi-task Model (ESMM) can eliminate the two problems
simultaneously by i) modeling CVR directly over the entire space,
ii) employing a feature representation transfer learning strategy.
concepts.implication: Useful for building item/user embeddings in retrieval systems

concepts.finding:
For example, predicted CVR is used in OCPC
(optimized cost-per-click) advertising to adjust bid price per click
to achieve a win-win of both platform and advertisers [4].
concepts.implication: Directly applicable to CTR/CVR prediction in advertising systems

an important factor in recommender systems to balance users’ click

In other words, user actions follow a sequential
pattern of impression →click →conversion.

concepts.finding:
In this way, CVR
modeling refers to the task of estimating the post-click conversion
